scenarios.description: At 6:42 PM on Thursday, a five-vehicle chain-reaction collision occurred on the Sheikh Zayed Road southbound near Al Khail interchange during rush hour. Heavy rain reduced visibility to 150 m and caused standing water on the right lane. A delivery van hydroplaned, striking the central barrier and triggering rear-end impacts involving two SUVs, a sedan, and a taxi. Three minor injuries reported. Right two lanes closed for 2 hours 10 minutes for debris removal and barrier repair. Congestion extended 4.8 km northbound. No nearby events; normal Thursday evening traffic.

causal_ground_truth.primary_cause: Hydroplaning due to standing water
causal_ground_truth.mechanism: Heavy rain → standing water → tire loses contact → directional control loss → initial impact → chain reaction

scenarios.description: At 10:30 PM on Wednesday, severe congestion developed along Corniche Road both directions approaching Al Khalidiyah due to full road closure for New Year's Eve 2026 fireworks viewing zone setup. scenarios.description: At 8:50 PM on Friday, gridlock developed on Al Ain Road (E95) approaching Al Wathba due to Sheikh Zayed Festival National Day celebrations and fireworks. scenarios.description: Cardiology Ward

causal_ground_truth.primary_cause: At 9:15 AM on Monday, a 65-year-old patient with congestive heart failure was readmitted to the cardiology ward within 30 days of discharge. causal_ground_truth.mechanism: Medication non-adherence post-discharge
